name: Siddharth Shankar
title: Senior Software Engineer at U.S. Bank

raw.name: Siddharth Shankar
raw.title: Senior Software Engineer at U.S. Bank
raw.bio: Software Engineer with over five years of experience in designing, developing, and maintaining multi-tier applications. Certified in cloud technologies with a passion for distributed systems and a strong background in quantum computing and AI. Proven track record in project success, team collaboration, and process improvement.
raw.skills: Quantum Computing, Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning
raw.experience:
- U.S. Bank (January 2023 - Present): Senior Software Engineer in Minneapolis, Minnesota
- Qualtrics (July 2021 - February 2023): Software Engineer II in Salt Lake City, Utah
- Cerner Corporation (January 2018 - April 2021): Software Engineer in Kansas City, Missouri
- Deloitte (October 2017 - January 2018): Software Developer in Greater Nashville Area, TN
- Outcomes Inc (March 2017 - October 2017): Programmer Analyst in Ashburn, Virginia
- Tata Consultancy Services (July 2013 - December 2015): System Engineer in Gurgaon, India
raw.achievements: Optimized application loading time by 50% through caching service calls, designed and implemented backend REST APIs for critical care applications, developed hybrid mobile applications using PhoneGap and AngularJS, implemented JWT authentication mechanism for enhanced security
raw.communicationStyle: Professional, concise, and results-oriented. Uses structured bullet points to highlight accomplishments and responsibilities. Demonstrates technical expertise with specific tools and technologies mentioned. Shows initiative in problem-solving and team collaboration.
raw.verbalQuirks:
Always starts with 'So here's the thing...'
Says 'at the end of the day' a lot
Thinks out loud before landing on an answer
Uses 'to be fair' as a filler
Uses 'the thing is...' a lot
Prefers bullet points over paragraphs
"quote and unquote" verbally on important word
